markets.rules_primary: If the highest numerical seed to qualify for the Semifinals of the 2026 men's college basketball tournament is a #1 seed, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this market, "highest seed" refers to the highest numerical seed (for example, a #13 seed is considered a higher seed than a #9 seed).

Kalshi is not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with the NCAA. All trademarks, logos, and brand names are the property of their respective owners.
